channel.title: Comments on: Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/rohrbach-brewing-company-180/comment-page-1/#comment-1733">Mr. Genesee</a>.
I have not, maybe I'll reach out to see if they want one...good idea!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Mr. Genesee.

I have not, maybe I’ll reach out to see if they want one…good idea!

item.title: By: Mr. Genesee
item.dc:creator: Mr. Genesee
item.description:
Hi Paul,
Did you make a video about the new Genesee Brew House? Would be great to see a follow up to your 2008 video. A lot has changed since then.
item.content:encoded:
Hi Paul,

Did you make a video about the new Genesee Brew House? Would be great to see a follow up to your 2008 video. A lot has changed since then.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Andy, we would LOVE to do them all this way...it really comes down to time and money. In the end, it's not much time or money to do them this way, it's just a matter of getting craft breweries to understand the value in spending just a little to get something like this video.
item.content:encoded: Thanks Andy, we would LOVE to do them all this way…it really comes down to time and money. In the end, it’s not much time or money to do them this way, it’s just a matter of getting craft breweries to understand the value in spending just a little to get something like this video.

item.title: By: Andy
item.dc:creator: Andy
item.description: Nice one! Would love to see more episodes like this, keep up the great work.
item.content:encoded: Nice one! Would love to see more episodes like this, keep up the great work.
